title: Description
description: The attachable description containing all configuration.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: The unique identifier for this attachable. Should match the item identifier it attaches to (e.g., 'minecraft:iron_chestplate').

min_engine_version.title: Minimum Engine Version
min_engine_version.description: The minimum engine version required for this attachable.

item.title: Item
item.description: The item identifier this attachable is associated with. If not specified, uses the attachable identifier.

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Material definitions for rendering the attachable. Keys are material names (e.g., 'default', 'enchanted'), values are material identifiers.

textures.title: Textures
textures.description: Texture definitions for the attachable. Keys are texture names (e.g., 'default', 'enchanted'), values are texture paths.

[a-zA-Z0-9_]+.title: Texture Path
[a-zA-Z0-9_]+.description: A texture path relative to the resource pack (e.g., 'textures/models/armor/iron_1').

geometry.title: Geometry
geometry.description: Geometry definitions for the attachable. Keys are geometry names (e.g., 'default'), values are geometry identifiers.

animations.title: Animations
animations.description: Animation and animation controller definitions. Keys are short names used in scripts, values are full animation/controller identifiers.

[a-zA-Z0-9_]+.title: Animation Identifier
[a-zA-Z0-9_]+.description: An animation or animation controller identifier (e.g., 'animation.elytra.gliding', 'controller.animation.elytra.default').

scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.description: Script definitions for the attachable, including initialization and animation triggers.

defaultSnippets.label: Scripts
defaultSnippets.description: Script definitions for the attachable, including initialization and animation triggers.

render_controllers.title: Render Controllers
render_controllers.description: List of render controller identifiers or conditional render controllers.

enable_attachables.title: Enable Attachables
enable_attachables.description: Whether to allow child attachables on this attachable.

particle_effects.title: Particle Effects
particle_effects.description: Particle effect definitions for the attachable.

sound_effects.title: Sound Effects
sound_effects.description: Sound effect definitions for the attachable.

spawn_egg.title: Spawn Egg
spawn_egg.description: Spawn egg configuration for this attachable, if applicable.

texture.title: Texture
texture.description: Texture path for the spawn egg.

texture_index.title: Texture Index
texture_index.description: Index into the spawn egg texture atlas.

defaultSnippets.label: Spawn Egg
defaultSnippets.description: Spawn egg configuration for this attachable, if applicable.

defaultSnippets.label: Description
defaultSnippets.description: The attachable description containing all configuration.
